checks.name: cursorless path for left single click

checks.name: try/except silent fallback

checks.name: hover (clicks==0) bypasses cursorless

checks.name: right click bypasses cursorless

checks.name: double click bypasses cursorless

checks.name: middle click bypasses cursorless

checks.name: drag bypasses cursorless
